message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync from v0.1.1 to v0.2.0 in conformance and runtime crates

Updates the asupersync version constraint from 0.1.1 to 0.2.0 in both
fnp-conformance and fnp-runtime. The conformance crate uses the registry
version directly while the runtime crate uses it as an optional dep with
default-features disabled. Both now point to the latest published release.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
